positive: A majestic, stylized mountain range silhouette against a dramatic watercolor sunset. The foreground features clean, minimalist outlines of pine trees, stylized hot air balloons, and wandering wildlife (deer, foxes). The composition is highly contrasting, emphasizing deep navy blues and fiery oranges, punctuated by touches of gold and lavender. The overall aesthetic is vintage botanical illustration meets modern geometric design, perfect for a t-shirt print. Clean lines, high detail, central focus, solid colors.
